meta.title: Merai — AI-powered video editing studio
meta.description: Upload raw footage and let Merai do the editing: accurate Arabic transcription, silence and filler removal, and publish-ready captions.

landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your raw recording and Merai handles the rest: accurate Arabic-first transcription, automatic silence, filler and retake removal, and publish-ready captions for every platform.
landing.feature1Body: High-accuracy speech-to-text in Modern Standard Arabic, with tolerance for Levantine, Gulf and Egyptian dialects.
landing.feature2Body: Silence, filler words and weak takes are removed automatically — the best take wins when you re-record a line.
landing.feature3Body: Change the transcript and the video re-cuts itself — review and approve, no complex timeline required.

auth.checkEmail: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Open it to activate your account.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.confirmError: We couldn't confirm your email. Try logging in or request a new link.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Your video studio — upload, let AI edit, and publish in your brand.

brandNudge.title: Finish your Brand Kit
brandNudge.body: Add your logo, colors and caption style so every video carries your brand automatically.

dashboard.emptyBody: Upload your raw recording and your AI editor gets to work — from transcript to a publish-ready video.

onboarding.title: How Merai works
onboarding.subtitle: Four steps from raw footage to a publish-ready video

upload.title: Upload your video
upload.body: Drop your raw recording as-is — up to 10 minutes per clip.

analyze.title: AI analyzes your content
analyze.body: Accurate transcription, then silence, fillers and repeated takes are removed.

review.title: Review the AI edits
review.body: Every cut is explained and restorable — and you edit the video as text.

export.title: Export your final video
export.body: A finished video with burned-in captions, ready for every platform.

upload.title: New project
upload.dropTitle: Drag your video here or click to choose
upload.dropHint: Up to 10 minutes per clip — MP4, MOV, WebM or MKV
upload.closeWarning: Don't close this page while uploading

errors.unsupported-type: Unsupported file format. Please upload MP4, MOV, WebM or MKV video.
errors.file-too-large: The file exceeds the size limit (2 GB).
errors.video-too-long: The video exceeds the maximum length: 10 minutes per clip.
errors.unreadable-duration: Couldn't read the video's duration. Try a different file.
errors.not-authenticated: Your session expired. Please log in again.
errors.create-failed: Couldn't create the project. Please try again.
errors.upload-failed: The upload couldn't finish. Check your connection and resume.
errors.object-missing: The upload didn't complete. Please try again.
errors.update-failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.enqueue-failed: Couldn't start processing. Please try again.

project.processingHint: You can leave this page and come back later — we'll keep working in the background.

working.analyzing: Finding your strongest moments and drafting the first cut…

project.errorBody: Your video is safe. Try again now — and if this keeps happening, contact us and we'll help.
project.emptyTranscript: We didn't detect any speech in this video. Make sure the clip contains clear audio.

edit.legend: Struck-through words will be cut from the final video — open the editor to review and adjust every cut.

editor.saveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
editor.videoError: Couldn't load the video — refresh the page and it'll be right back.
editor.transcriptHint: Click a word to seek, Shift+click to select a range, then delete it. Click struck-through words to see why they were cut or to restore them.
editor.timelineHint: Drag edges to trim, drag a block to reorder; red markers are removed content

reasons.bad-take: Repeated take — a better take was kept

reasonExplainers.filler: A filler word that adds no meaning — cutting it tightens the pacing.
reasonExplainers.silence: A quiet gap longer than natural between speech.
reasonExplainers.bad-take: You recorded this line more than once — the strongest take was kept.
reasonExplainers.false-start: A sentence that started, then was restarted.
reasonExplainers.user: You cut this yourself — restore it anytime.

aiAssistant.title: AI assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: State your goal and Merai proposes an edit plan — you approve it
aiAssistant.placeholder: e.g. Make this shorter and faster
aiAssistant.workingNote: The assistant is studying your video and drafting a plan — a few seconds…
aiAssistant.appliedNote: Plan applied — review it in the preview; one Undo reverts everything.
aiAssistant.staleWarning: The edit changed after this plan was made — request a fresh suggestion.
aiAssistant.requestError: Couldn't send the request. Please try again.
aiAssistant.safeNote: Your original version always remains safe — every change is one Undo away.

feedback.thanks: Thanks — your feedback helps improve your editor.

errors.ai-unavailable: The AI assistant isn't enabled on the server right now.
errors.generic: Couldn't produce a valid plan for this request — try different wording.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.hint: Press ? anytime to open this list

captionStudio.sampleLong: This is how your captions will look

brandKit.pageSubtitle: Set your brand identity once — every video you export carries it.
brandKit.loadError: Couldn't load your Brand Kit. Please try again.
brandKit.logoError: Couldn't upload the logo. Use PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG under 2 MB.
brandKit.captionHint: The style suggested automatically when you export.
brandKit.gradientHint: A dark gradient at the bottom makes captions easier to read on vertical videos.
brandKit.lowerThirdHint: Your name and title shown at the bottom — leave empty to hide it.
brandKit.previewNote: Approximate preview — the gradient and lower third appear on your videos at export.

export.title: Export
export.applyBranding: Apply my branding to this video
export.brandingHint: Adds the bottom gradient and lower third from your Brand Kit.
export.brandingNone: No Brand Kit set up yet.
export.serverNote: You can leave this page — the export continues on the server
export.done: Export complete — your video is ready to publish!
